Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8009 "ISS-INCREDIBLESHRINKINGSPHERE-07E2-8009" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $07e2 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "ISS - Incredible Shrinking Sphere.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Add an init routine at $07E2 which sets the CIA#1 interrupt control and status register ($DC0D) to $01 to allow the game to run correctly.
